                 +------------------------------+
                 |   +------------------ Outer  |
                 |   |               Inner  |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |   +--------------+   |   |
                 |   |   |        Deep  |   |   |
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
+-------+        |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |  +------+
|  Out  |<-------o---o---o--+  Node  |<-o---o---o--+  In  |
+-------+        |   |   |  +--------+  |   |   |  +------+
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
                 |   |   |              |   |   |
                 |   |   +--------------+   |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   |                      |   |
                 |   +----------------------+   |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 |                              |
                 +------------------------------+
